<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get Session"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/admin/sessions/{id}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint is useful for:

Getting a session object with all specified expandables that exist in an administrative context.
